scene.message: Mark: Dead end here too.{waitkey}{ret}
So, what's the news?{nl} Anything new happen?{waitkey}{ret}
Please take me with you!{nl} {ctl0e:7}{ret}
Elly: How wonderful!{nl} I'll do my best!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What were you{nl} doing in the subway?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Elly's got guts...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What an experience...{nl} I'm so happy!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: What's going to{nl} happen to us all...{waitkey}{ret}
